outlook_paragraph: Ovintiv shows moderate drilling activity with 9 active sites at decision date, 2.5 above the recent average, driven by 3 newly active pads. With half of production exposed to current WTI levels near $44/boe and realized prices at a 10% discount, revenue is supported by stable but modest production growth. The deterministic forecast of $1.79B reflects this balanced activity and midstream-constrained pricing environment. Operations appear focused on core areas, with half of active sites running continuously.
